texto: My parents had torn through my innocence and left me with a tar-like substance that was corrupting what was left of me. I could feel it at night
autor: slithering and curling around my soul as it slowly devoured me. It was draining my energy and replacing it with an evil I was afraid to confront.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a slithering and curling around my soul as it slowly devoured me. It was draining my energy and replacing it with an evil I was afraid to confront.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “My parents had torn through my innocence and left me with a tar-like substance that was corruptin…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, j-d-stroube, caged-in-darkness pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao-noturna e boa-noite.
